items.question: What is SpicyChat AI?
items.answer: SpicyChat AI is a platform for creating and chatting with AI-powered characters. Unlike other platforms, it allows unrestricted NSFW content and adult roleplay scenarios. You can browse 500K+ community-made bots or create your own custom characters.

items.question: Is SpicyChat AI free?
items.answer: Yes, SpicyChat AI offers a free tier with basic access to community bots and limited daily messages. For unlimited messaging, priority queue, voice features, and mobile app access, you can upgrade to Premium.

items.question: Is SpicyChat AI NSFW?
items.answer: Absolutely. SpicyChat AI is specifically designed for adult content and NSFW roleplay. Unlike Character AI which has strict SFW filters, SpicyChat has no content restrictions for adult scenarios. Users must be 18+.

items.question: How do I create a chatbot on SpicyChat?
items.answer: Click 'Create' in the navigation menu, choose 'Chatbot', then fill in your character's name, personality traits, backstory, and upload an avatar. You can define greeting messages, example dialogs, and even connect lorebooks for complex world-building.

items.question: Can I use SpicyChat AI on mobile?
items.answer: Yes! SpicyChat AI has native mobile apps for both iOS and Android. You can download them from the App Store or Google Play Store. The mobile experience includes all features including voice messages.

items.question: What are the best SpicyChat AI alternatives?
items.answer: Top alternatives include Crushon AI (good NSFW support), Janitor AI (API access for power users), Candy AI (romantic focus), and Chub AI (similar community). However, SpicyChat leads in features with voice, group chats, and mobile apps.

items.question: Is there a Character AI NSFW version?
items.answer: No, Character AI (c.AI) has strict SFW filters and actively blocks adult content. Users looking for NSFW alternatives typically switch to SpicyChat AI, Crushon AI, or Janitor AI. SpicyChat is the most feature-complete NSFW alternative.

items.question: How does the voice feature work?
items.answer: SpicyChat AI's voice feature uses AI-generated speech to bring your characters to life. Premium users can enable voice for any bot, choosing from different voice styles. The voice adapts to the character's personality for immersive roleplay.

items.question: What are lorebooks?
items.answer: Lorebooks are SpicyChat's world-building system. They allow you to define complex settings, rules, relationships, and background information that your bot references during conversations. Perfect for intricate fantasy or sci-fi scenarios.

items.question: Is SpicyChat AI safe and private?
items.answer: SpicyChat AI uses encryption for conversations and does not share your chats publicly. However, as with any online platform, avoid sharing personal information with AI characters. The platform is operated by NextDay AI Inc, a legitimate company based in Canada.

items.question: How do group chats work?
items.answer: Group chats allow multiple AI characters to interact in the same conversation. You can create scenarios where 2, 3, or more bots talk to each other and to you. Perfect for complex roleplay with multiple personalities and relationship dynamics.

items.question: Can I earn money creating bots on SpicyChat?
items.answer: Yes! SpicyChat has a creator leaderboard and monetization features. Popular bot creators can earn through the platform's reward system. The affiliate program at promote.spicychat.ai also allows you to earn commissions by referring new users.
